title: TOMLOV DM9 7" LCD Digital Microscope 1200X, 12MP Coin Magnification, 1080P HD Video Soldering USB Scope for Adult, with LED Light, Adjustable Metal Stand, PC/Windows/Mac Compatible, 32GB Card Included
features: 7-Inch LCD Rotatable Display: Enjoy clear, sharp images with the 7-inch HD screen. The 90-degree rotatable design enhances comfort and reduces eye and neck strain
50X-1200X Magnification: Easily zoom in to view the tiniest details with magnification from 50X to 1200X. Enjoy a fully lit view with 8 LED lights and 2 additional goose-neck illuminators
Supports PC View: The PC view supports Windows and Mac OS, allowing you to observe on a larger scale and facilitate data sharing and analysis

1080P Video & 12MP Photos: Capture high-quality images and videos for an amazing micro-world experience. Ideal for both professionals and hobbyists, this microscope provides clear, detailed views of your specimens
Steady Metal Frame: Utilizes aluminum alloy to build the base, stand, and holder, this coin microscope offers long-term use and allows for micro soldering or repairing printed circuit boards
Easy Storage and Transfer: This microscope comes with a 32GB Micro SD card, allowing you to save numerous photos and videos, and easily share them
Widely Used Tools: With support for multilingual systems, this microscope is accessible to users worldwide
Perfect Microscopes: Give the gift of discovery with our premium microscopes. Ideal for collectors, hobbyists, and curious minds, our microscopes offer unmatched clarity and precision

Multiple Professional Image Effects Easily capture and share your discoveries using the provided 32GB memory card. Capture photos or record videos, then effortlessly transfer them to your computer for uploading and sharing. The TOMLOV MD9 digital microscope supports up to 1080P video and 12MP photos.
